Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.NotFreeIn

  • Packages that use NotFreeIn 
    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
    This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
    This package contains classes for implementing rules.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder

    • Uses of NotFreeIn in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule that return types with arguments of type NotFreeIn 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> Taclet.varsNotFreeIn()
      returns an iterator over the variable pairs that indicate that are new in the Taclet.
      ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> TacletApplPart.varsNotFreeIn()
      returns the list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation of a Taclet
      Constructor parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule with type arguments of type NotFreeIn 
      Constructor and Description
      TacletApplPart(Sequent ifseq, ImmutableList<NewVarcond> varsNew, ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn, ImmutableList<NewDependingOn> varsNewDependingOn, ImmutableList<VariableCondition> variableConditions)
      constructs a new TacletApplPart object with the given Sequent, a list of variables that are new, a list of variable pairs that represent the NotFreeIn relation and a list of additional generic variable conditions.

      Fields in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder with type parameters of type NotFreeIn 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> TacletBuilder.varsNotFreeIn 
      Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder that return types with arguments of type NotFreeIn 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Iterator<NotFreeIn> TacletBuilder.varsNotFreeIn() 
      Method parameters in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder with type arguments of type NotFreeIn 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void TacletBuilder.addVarsNotFreeIn(ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> list)
      adds a list of NotFreeIn variable pairs to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v0 is not free in v1 for all entries (v0,v1) in the given list.
